The key is to stress-test your budget early—housing costs are the biggest wildcard in your golden years.

sent.quote: Before you start collecting Social Security while working, know that in 2024, the earnings limit is $22,320—if you exceed that before full retirement age, you lose $1 in benefits for every $2 over. At QFINHUB, our retirement calculator shows that many Americans can boost lifetime income by delaying claims until 70, especially if they keep working part-time.
